    static javax.ws.rs.client.Client
    createStandardClient(com.emc.rest.smart.SmartConfig smartConfig)
    This creates a standard apache-based Jersey client, configured with a SmartConfig, but without any load balancing or node polling.

    createStandardClient(com.emc.rest.smart.SmartConfig smartConfig, org.glassfish.jersey.client.spi.ConnectorProvider connectorProvider)
    This creates a standard apache-based Jersey client, configured with a SmartConfig, but without any load balancing or node polling.

    • createSmartClient

      public static javax.ws.rs.client.Client createSmartClient(com.emc.rest.smart.SmartConfig smartConfig)

      public static javax.ws.rs.client.Client createSmartClient(com.emc.rest.smart.SmartConfig smartConfig, org.glassfish.jersey.client.spi.ConnectorProvider baseConnectorProvider)

    • createStandardClient

      public static javax.ws.rs.client.Client createStandardClient(com.emc.rest.smart.SmartConfig smartConfig)
      This creates a standard apache-based Jersey client, configured with a SmartConfig, but without any load balancing or node polling.

    • createStandardClient

      public static javax.ws.rs.client.Client createStandardClient(com.emc.rest.smart.SmartConfig smartConfig, org.glassfish.jersey.client.spi.ConnectorProvider connectorProvider)
      This creates a standard apache-based Jersey client, configured with a SmartConfig, but without any load balancing or node polling.

    • destroy

      public static void destroy(javax.ws.rs.client.Client client)
      Destroy this client. Any system resources associated with the client will be cleaned up.

      This method must be called when there are not responses pending otherwise undefined behavior will occur.

      The client must not be reused after this method is called otherwise undefined behavior will occur.
